use_cases: Creating custom gradient color palettes for branding and UI design projects
Generating CSS gradient code for web development implementation
Designing colorful backgrounds and visual effects for digital assets
Experimenting with color combinations for creative workflows
Exporting gradient presets for use across multiple design tools
ai_summary: A gradient generator tool that enables users to create, customize, and export colorful gradient palettes. Features interactive color controls and real-time preview of gradient combinations, making it ideal for designers and developers seeking beautiful gradient effects for UI, branding, and digital assets.
